title: sideritis leucantha var. bourgeana
intro: Sideritis leucantha var. bourgeana, also known as Bourgeau's mountain tea, is a plant species within the genus Sideritis, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, that are responsible for its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Bourgeau's mountain tea include reduced inflammation, improved antioxidant defenses, and potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
